items.name: auto-height
items.title: Auto Height
items.description: A Motion-powered container that observes its content and smoothly animates to the latest measured height.

items.name: copy-button
items.title: Copy Button
items.description: A shadcn Button-based copy control that writes text to the clipboard and animates a copy → check icon swap.

items.name: smooth-button
items.title: Smooth Button
items.description: A shadcn Button-based action that animates idle, loading, and success states with Motion.
